initial_prompt: In the project at {workdir}, this rust build_error fails: Rust linker not found — set CC explicitly. Reproduce the failure with `env PATH="$PWD/no_cc_path" RUSTC="$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/rustc" "$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/cargo" clean --quiet && env PATH="$PWD/no_cc_path" RUSTC="$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/rustc" "$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/cargo" test --quiet --lib`, diagnose the root cause by reading the project files, and apply a fix so that same command exits 0.

success_criteria.fix_command_test: cd {workdir} && env PATH="$PWD/no_cc_path" RUSTC="$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/rustc" "$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/cargo" clean --quiet && env PATH="$PWD/no_cc_path" RUSTC="$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/rustc" "$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/stable-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin/cargo" test --quiet --lib
